headline: How The Story Is Shifting For American Electric Power Company (AEP) On Data Center Growth And Risk
summary: The modeled fair value for American Electric Power Company has shifted slightly, moving from US$144.29 to US$144.52, which reflects only a very small adjustment to the price target. This kind of fine tuning lines up with recent Street research that focuses less on big valuation swings and more on how data center demand, rising capital plans, and regulatory or political constraints might shape the story from here. As you read on, you will see how these moving pieces feed into the evolving...
